description:
The table displays the colour palette for a Raster Confidence Layer product, mapping confidence values to specific RGB colour codes.
| Confidence value [%] | Colour (R,G,B) |
|---|---|
| 100 | 12, 47, 122 |
| 80 | 32, 153, 143 |
| 60 | 0, 219, 0 |
| 40 | 255, 255, 0 |
| 20 | 237, 161, 19 |
| 0 | 194, 82, 60 |
The palette visualises a gradient where the highest confidence value (100%) is dark blue, transitioning through teal (80%), bright green (60%), yellow (40%), orange (20%), and finally dark orange/red for the lowest confidence value (0%).
